title: Looking for Category Manager at Blue Dart

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Blue Dart
jsonLd.description:
Blue Dart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Ghaziabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Blue Dart:
Blue Dart is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Blue Dart!
